queue_item.action: Require transparency-log verification by default before DSSE evidence is cryptographically promotable.

progress.finding: The prior classifier preserved transparency-log status as metadata but did not require it for signer threshold acceptance.
progress.verification: GitHub accepted source and test writes; no workflow run existed for the test commit, so test execution is not claimed.
progress.trust_limit: This classifier consumes external verifier results; it does not itself validate signatures, certificate chains, transparency-log inclusion proofs, or claim truth.

queue_item.handoff: Cloudflare and Vercel evidence workflows should use the default transparency requirement for public Sigstore/GitHub attestation paths. Any intentionally offline or private-PKI path must set requireTransparencyLog false explicitly and document its alternative trust root.

preservation_rule: Do not overwrite operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json, other teams' queue updates, or Git history.
